name: stage2-rvv-typed-config-arithmetic
title: Stage2 RVV typed SEW/LMUL config derivation for generic arithmetic
description: Bounded Stage2 task from Hermes Direction Brief: implement provider-local typed SEW/LMUL/config derivation for existing generic RVV arithmetic routes, support existing i32/m1 plus one additional coherent typed vector configuration if executable, fail closed for unsupported combinations, and keep common EmitC/export neutral.
